summary: Portfolio site got a major refresh with interactive dashboards and live data, build logging was automated, and CLI tooling migrated to a newer API. One feature landed for workspace labeling and some SEO optimization work across the ecosystem.

highlights.text: Replaced static mock content with interactive CSS dashboards and live landing screenshots, fixed API endpoint for user repos, and improved mobile responsiveness.
Migrated all commands to REST v1 API in v0.3.1.
Added OS workspace labeling for independent labels.
Optimized landing page for AI overview indexing and scaled for SaaS tier promotion.
